name: Chutney Peanut Butter Canapes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Major Grey's chutney, finely chopped
Toasted rye bread slices, crusts removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the peanut butter, cream cheese, salt, red wine, and Worcestershire sauce together well.
2. Mix in the chopped chutney until combined.
3. Spread the mixture onto toasted rye bread slices.
4. Cut into individual triangles or fingers.
5. Makes 2 cups of spread.
